articles.title: INVEST IN AMARA – WHERE CRYPTO MEETS EVERYDAY SPENDING
articles.summary: AMARA bridges digital assets and real-world payments through a premium charge-card structure. Its revenue comes from interchange, membership fees, travel commissions, and token-related economics, creating diversified monetization beyond traditional card programs [4].

articles.title: NOMURA'S LASER DIGITAL APPLIES FOR US NATIONAL TRUST BANK
articles.summary: Laser Digital, Nomura's digital asset arm, filed for an OCC national trust bank license to launch institutional crypto custody, spot trading, and staking. Joining Ripple and Circle, the firm targets federally regulated infrastructure to meet increasing institutional demand for secure, governed access to digital asset markets.

articles.title: ALTCOINS JUMP AS DOLLAR SLIDES, BITCOIN HOLDS STEADY
articles.summary: The Dollar Index fell to a four-year low, breaking below a 2011 trendline, which supported crypto prices with bitcoin holding near $89,200 and ether topping $3,000. Altcoins significantly outperformed the majors, with the altcoin-heavy CD80 index posting a 3.7% daily gain versus 2.47% for bitcoin-dominant CD20. The altcoin strength reflects typical rotation patterns as bitcoin remains range-bound, with capital flowing to more speculative assets. Despite the upside, derivatives markets saw another $230 million in long liquidations over 24 hours, while put options continue trading at a premium to calls with increased demand for downside hedges at the $85,000 strike.

articles.title: PREDICTION CAPITAL MARKETS
articles.summary: Despite generating $150B+ in volume and $800M in revenue through platforms like Pump since January 2024, creator tokens suffer from a fundamental structural flaw: perpetual onchain instruments tracking ephemeral attention create perpetual bagholders by design. The lack of objective resolution mechanisms means winners are determined by exit timing rather than correctness, enabling manipulation while forcing creators to absorb direct reputation damage whenever they withdraw fees or token prices decline. The proposed solution replaces perpetual creator tokens with time-bounded markets featuring defined speculation windows and resolution endpoints that match the ephemeral nature of attention cycles.

articles.title: EIGENCLOUD: VERIFIABLE OFF-CHAIN COMPUTATION
articles.summary: EigenCloud introduces a hybrid verification model that combines Trusted Execution Environments (TEE) with restaking-based economic security to enable verifiable off-chain computation, addressing the fundamental lack of transparency in traditional cloud services while circumventing blockchain's computational limitations. The platform allows complex operations like AI inference and GPU-intensive workloads to execute off-chain with cryptographic proof of correct execution, bridging the gap between Web2 scalability and Web3 verifiability. Its architecture supports familiar developer tools, including Docker containers and external API calls, requiring minimal smart contract expertise to implement verifiable applications. Target use cases span prediction markets, institutional finance, cross-chain security infrastructure, and AI agent ecosystems where result verification and trustless coordination are critical.

articles.title: THE 7 POWERS IN CRYPTO
articles.summary: Traditional moats like scale economies, network effects, and switching costs are being eroded by open-source code and composability. Certain advantages survive: "Lindyness" (Aave capturing 100x more lending supply than competitors at lower rates due to multi-cycle security track record), liquidity network effects (Pump's bonding curve mechanizing tipping points), counter-positioning (Morpho's isolated markets vs Aave's monolithic approach), and brand power (CryptoPunks' cryptographically-enforced provenance). Durable crypto advantage accrues around mechanisms that make ownership credibly scarce – "internet bearer assets" – where security history becomes a competitive moat.

articles.title: WHEN NETWORK BECOMES THE MEDIUM
articles.summary: Blockchain-based art transcends traditional preservation by embedding creation directly into network infrastructure. CryptoPunks has generated $3.07B in trading volume and achieved institutional recognition from MoMA, Centre Pompidou, LACMA, and others, positioning creators Matt Hall and John Watkinson among top-selling living artists. Networked art maintained by global consensus may outlive traditional museums. The Infinite NODE Foundation is launching a Larva Labs exhibition featuring a live Ethereum node sculpture that visualizes real-time network activity.

articles.title: EUROPEAN STABLECOINS ARE DIVERSIFYING BEYOND THE DOLLAR
articles.summary: EUR stablecoins reached a $617M market cap in early 2026 (Circle's EURC alone at $398M), Swiss CHF stablecoins hit $17.7M, overtaking GBP's $6.1M, and UAH stablecoins total $1.2M with strong local usage. Europe's stablecoin market is diversifying beyond USD dominance with clear upside for payments-driven GBP and regional coins.

articles.title: FOLLOW THE FEES: STABLECOIN ISSUERS ARE THE TOLL BOOTH
articles.summary: A fee map shows stablecoin issuers dominating DeFi's cashflow. Tether $417.9M (30D) and Circle $196.2M (30D) lead the leaderboard while DeFi-native issuers Sky ($33.1M, +31.7%) and Ethena ($23.3M, +14.9%) are the fastest growers, illustrating that whoever controls on-chain USD rails captures persistent, pump-proof revenue from settlement, lending, margin, liquidity, and treasury flows.

articles.title: HOW POLKADOT BECAME PROFITABLE FOR THE FIRST TIME IN THREE YEARS
articles.summary: Polkadot secured a 4.1 million dollar profit in Q4 2025.

articles.title: CHINESE MONEY LAUNDERERS DRIVE GLOBAL ECOSYSTEM WORTH $82BN
articles.summary: Chinese money laundering networks processed 16 billion dollars in 2023, driving the global illicit ecosystem to 82 billion dollars.

articles.title: ETHEREUM RESEARCH PROPOSE FOCIL AS CENSORSHIP-RESISTANCE FOR HEGOTA
articles.summary: Ethereum researchers introduced FOCIL to bolster censorship resistance within the 2026 Hegota upgrade.

articles.title: $11 TRILLION ON THE RAILS: ETHEREUM'S TOKENIZATION MOMENT
articles.summary: ARK Invest projects tokenized real-world assets growing from $19B today to $11T by 2030.
